task_completion.visual_evidence: The Product Explorer panel in the SNAP GUI shows 'landsat_multispectral' loaded as a product.

task_completion.description: Apply an edge detection spatial filter
task_completion.visual_evidence: Visual evidence of applying an edge detection filter (e.g., Sobel, Roberts, Prewitt, or Laplacian). This can be a spatial filter dialog box being configured with one of these filters, or a resulting band with the filter name visible in the Product Explorer.

task_completion.description: Apply a smoothing or low-pass spatial filter
task_completion.visual_evidence: Visual evidence of applying a smoothing/low-pass filter (e.g., Mean or Gaussian). This can be a spatial filter dialog box being configured with one of these filters, or a resulting band with the filter name visible in the Product Explorer.

task_completion.description: Ensure the final product contains at least 6 bands
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Bands' folder for the product in the Product Explorer is expanded, showing at least 6 distinct bands (the 4 original bands plus the 2 newly created filtered bands).

task_completion.description: Save the complete product in BEAM-DIMAP format
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save Product' dialog showing the product being saved to the '/home/ga/snap_projects' directory in BEAM-DIMAP format, or a file manager/terminal showing a '.dim' file in that directory.

task_completion.description: Export the product as a GeoTIFF
task_completion.visual_evidence: An 'Export' dialog showing the product being exported as a GeoTIFF to '/home/ga/snap_exports/filtered_landsat.tif', or a file manager/terminal showing the exported '.tif' file in that directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the SNAP GUI to perform the tasks
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the SNAP (Sentinel Application Platform) graphical interface, rather than just running scripts or command-line tools to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: Filters were genuinely applied using the software tools
integrity.visual_evidence: The filtered bands are created using the software's built-in spatial filter tools (e.g., via Raster > Image Math or Raster > Filter menus), not by simply renaming existing bands.

integrity.description: Files were saved and exported via the application
integrity.visual_evidence: The files are saved and exported using the SNAP application's File > Save/Export menus and dialogs, rather than being spoofed via terminal commands like 'touch' or 'cp'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The source image is located at /home/ga/snap_data/landsat_multispectral.tif and contains exactly 4 spectral bands. The final product must have at least 6 bands (4 original + 2 filtered). The BEAM-DIMAP project must be saved in /home/ga/snap_projects and the GeoTIFF must be exported to /home/ga/snap_exports/filtered_landsat.tif.
